query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, s.paddleCustomerId, s.paddleSubscriptionId, s.paddleTransactionId, s.plan, s.status, s.cancelAtPeriodEnd, s.currentPeriodEnd FROM users u LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON u.id = s.userId WHERE u.email = 'naiaretta.1998@hotmail.com';
